svg.title: CI/CD Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Full architecture showing GitHub repo triggering GitHub Actions pipeline which builds, tests, analyses, and pushes to AWS ECR, deploying to ECS Fargate behind an ALB, with infrastructure provisioned by Terraform and secrets injected automatically.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the GitHub push trigger the workflow?')
sendPrompt('What does mvn test do in the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does SonarCloud analyse code quality?')
sendPrompt('Why publish the artifact to GitHub Packages?')

svg.text: runs only on main, after job 1

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is mvn package run again in job 2?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions authenticate to AWS ECR?')
sendPrompt('What happens during docker build and ECR push?')
sendPrompt('What AWS resources does Terraform provision?')
sendPrompt('How does Terraform inject secrets into GitHub Actions?')
sendPrompt('Why is ECR set to IMMUTABLE image tags?')
sendPrompt('How does the Application Load Balancer route traffic?')

svg.text: vprofile service · task def · 512 CPU / 1024 MB · awsvpc · private subnets

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does CloudWatch log from ECS?')
sendPrompt('What is the S3 bucket used for in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does external traffic reach the application?')
